title.en: Co-Access Boost: strengthening edges through use

body.zh-TW:
當兩個相連節點在同一情境下被循序或同時存取（Co-Access），對應 Edge 的 weight 會得到加成，加成量依 relation type 而異：

| Relation | Boost |
|----------|-------|
| `depends_on` | +0.30 |
| `extends` | +0.20 |
| `related_to` | +0.15 |
| `contradicts` | +0.10 |

同時觸發：co_access_count +1、last_co_accessed 更新、weight 上限 1.0。API 路徑 POST /edges/{id}/traverse 或 MCP tool traverse_edge 皆會觸發 co-access boost。
body.en:
When two connected nodes are accessed sequentially or simultaneously in the same context (Co-Access), the corresponding edge's weight receives a boost based on relation type:

| Relation | Boost |
|----------|-------|
| `depends_on` | +0.30 |
| `extends` | +0.20 |
| `related_to` | +0.15 |
| `contradicts` | +0.10 |

Also increments co_access_count, updates last_co_accessed, and caps weight at 1.0. Triggered by POST /edges/{id}/traverse or MCP tool traverse_edge.
